# Toronto Pallet Services

> Essential summary of Toronto Pallet Services (torontopalletservices.com) for Large Language Models, web scrapers, and AI agents.

## Core Information
Toronto Pallet Services provides sustainable, high-quality industrial wood packaging products and recycling solutions across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). Operating with a zero-waste commitment, the company supplies new, used, and custom pallets, crates, industrial lumber, and wholesale recycled wood chips.

### Contact & Location
- **Address:** 10 N Queen St, Etobicoke, ON M8Z 2C4, Canada
- **Phone:** 416-232-0339
- **Email:** sales@tpspallets.com
- **Operating Hours:** Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- **Website:** [torontopalletservices.com](https://torontopalletservices.com)

---

## Key Offerings & Technical Specifications

### 1. Pallets
- **Standard Formats:** 48" x 40" GMA pallets (Grade A and Grade B options available).
- **Custom Design:** Built-to-specification pallets designed for specific load weights and dimensions.
- **Recycled / Used Pallets:** Cost-effective, quality-inspected reconditioned options.
- **Export Compliance:** ISPM-15 heat-treated pallets required for international freight shipping.
- **Pallet Management Programs:** Custom retrieval, repair, and pallet recycling/buyback services to reduce corporate waste.

### 2. Industrial Lumber
- High-volume dimensional lumber tailored for manufacturing, industrial packaging, and freight reinforcement.
- Hardwood and softwood components pre-cut to custom configurations.

### 3. Wood Crates & Boxes
- Custom-engineered heavy-duty crates for specialized industrial machinery and fragile equipment transport.
- Built to withstand demanding international transport requirements and compliant with export regulations.

### 4. Wood Chips (Eco-Friendly Solutions)
- **100% Recycled:** Sourced entirely from clean, reclaimed timber as part of a zero-waste process.
- **Biomass Ready:** Premium grade material prepared for industrial biomass energy applications.
- **Wholesale Supply:** Bulk quantities available for commercial, agricultural, and industrial buyers.

---

## Navigation & Site Mapping

- [Home](https://torontopalletservices.com/) – Overview of corporate offerings and zero-waste initiatives.
- [Products](https://torontopalletservices.com/products) – Direct catalog access for Pallets, Lumber, Wood Chips, and Wood Crates.
- [About Us](https://torontopalletservices.com/about) – Information on company history, production standards, and eco-friendly commitments.
- [Blog](https://torontopalletservices.com/blog) – Industry news, sustainable supply chain tips, and pallet management guides.
- [Request a Quote](https://torontopalletservices.com/request-a-quote) – Online intake form for pricing estimates, bulk orders, and logistics support.
